corruptedCharacters.title: Warn if some possibly corrupted characters are found in the target entry
corruptedCharacters.description: Check for patterns indicating corrupted characters.

checkAllowedCharacters.title: Verify the ITS Allowed Characters property
checkAllowedCharacters.description: Check target characters against the ITS Allowed Characters property.

checkCharacters.title: Warn if a character is not included in the following character set encoding
checkCharacters.description: Warn if a character is not in the specified character set encoding.

extraCharsAllowed.title: Allow the characters matching the following regular expression pattern
extraCharsAllowed.description: Regular expression matching characters to allow beyond the character set.

charset.title: Character Set Encoding
charset.description: Name of the character set encoding to check against (e.g. ISO-8859-1).
